name: @appstrate/pin
description: Upsert a named slot pinned into the system prompt on every run. Per-actor by default; pass scope="shared" when the slot tracks state against a resource shared across actors (synced repo, shared inbox, shared DB).

tool.name: pin
tool.description: Upsert a named slot pinned into the system prompt on every run. Last-write-wins per (scope, key). Use key="checkpoint" for the carry-over checkpoint slot; other keys (e.g. "persona", "goals") create additional named pinned blocks. Scope defaults to "actor": scheduled runs (under the schedule owner's identity), manual triggers, and different members each maintain their own private copy of the slot and will not see each other's writes. Pass scope="shared" when the slot tracks state against a resource shared across actors (a synced repo, a shared inbox, a shared database) — otherwise an agent triggered both manually and by a schedule will desynchronise and repeat work.

key.description: Pinned slot identifier. Lowercase, digits and underscores only. "checkpoint" is reserved for the carry-over checkpoint slot.

content.description: Arbitrary JSON value stored under the pinned slot.

scope.description: Persistence scope. "actor" (default) gives every actor their own private copy of the slot — scheduled runs, manual triggers, and different members do not share state. "shared" makes the slot app-wide so every run reads and writes the same value; use this when the slot tracks a resource shared across actors.
